title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Manipal Hospitals

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Manipal Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
We at Manipal Hospitals are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Manipal Hospitals:
Manipal Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals!
